[et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ fullwidth=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ bottom_divider_style=”wave2″ bottom_divider_color=”#f5e9ad” bottom_divider_height=”50px” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_fullwidth_code admin_label=”Fullwidth Code” _builder_version=”4.16″ _module_preset=”default” global_colors_info=”{}”]In your html page, add the snippet and call gtag_report_conversion when someone clicks on the chosen link or button. –>[/et_pb_fullwidth_code][et_pb_fullwidth_header title=”Mini Buffet Menu” text_orientation=”center” admin_label=”Fullwidth Header” _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”rgba(0,0,0,0.5)” background_image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/LXC1-031.jpg” background_blend=”overlay” custom_padding=”||88px|||” title_text_shadow_style=”preset1″ title_text_shadow_color=”#e02b20″ global_colors_info=”{}”][/et_pb_fullwidth_header][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.16″ max_width=”1980px” module_alignment=”center” global_colors_info=”{}” custom_margin__hover_enabled=”on|desktop”][et_pb_column type=”4_4″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_text _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”]

Mini Buffet Catering

We are also popular in providing mini catering in Singapore. Our customers have given positive feedback after consuming our mini catering service and would definitely come back again for our service.

To provide the best mini buffet catering in Singapore, our team of chefs are all well-trained to ensure the quality of our food is perfect and stable. They also strive to innovate a lot of new dishes to keep impressing our customers and their guests. Moreover, we always aim to provide the food in the most healthy way: No MSG, No preservatives, Less salt, Using vegetable oil.

Menus for Mini Buffet Catering in Singapore

There are 3 menus available for your selections which can accommodate from 10 pax and above. Thus, it can fit for your private family gatherings, friends’ birthday parties, or even small corporate functions. From each menu, there are more than 100 dishes for your choices.

However, if the menus below are not fit for your requirement, we are also able to customise the menu for your event. What you have to do is just to contact our customer service team and tell them what are your special requirements (e.g vegetarian dietary restrictions). Our team for sure can answer and give you the best menu.

Please browse our mini catering menu below and feel free to contact us at 68159119 or email us at enquiry@houseofcatering.com.sg and order our high quality mini buffet.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built=”1″ _builder_version=”4.16″ background_color=”#f5e9ad” custom_padding=”0px||0px|||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_row column_structure=”1_3,1_3,1_3″ use_custom_gutter=”on” make_equal=”on” _builder_version=”4.17.6″ max_width=”1980px” custom_margin=”-4px|auto||auto||” custom_padding=”0px|||||” global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Super Value Mini Buffet Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/super-value-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Mini-Buffet.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$15.50/pax (5 Dishes + 1 Sweet Treat / Dessert) Min. 20 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Savory Mini Buffet Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/savory-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Mini-Buffet-1.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$16.50/pax (5 Dishes + 1 Sweet Treat + 1 Dessert) Min. 15 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type=”1_3″ _builder_version=”4.16″ global_colors_info=”{}”][et_pb_blurb title=”Plush Mini Buffet Menu” url=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/plush-menu/” image=”https://www.houseofcatering.com.sg/wp-content/uploads/2019/09/Mini-Buffet-2.jpg” _builder_version=”4.16″ text_orientation=”center” global_colors_info=”{}”]

$18.50/pax (6 Dishes + 1 Sweet Treat + 1 Dessert) Min. 10 pax
Additional dish ordered will be charged at $2.50 per dish per pax

[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
